$schema-note: Levels arrayed by chapter -> level. Border walls (24px) are auto-added by GameScene from `bounds` unless a level sets `border:false`, so `walls` only lists INTERIOR geometry. Coordinates are pixel centers. `par` = target shift count for a 3-star clear.

levels.hint: Press an Arrow key / WASD (or swipe) to change which way is down.
Reach the far corner. Sometimes you must fall sideways, then up.
A wall blocks the floor. Go up and over.
Over the wall, then all the way back down.
Spikes are deadly. Go up and over them.
Over the spike, then back down to the goal.
Spikes hang from the ceiling now. Stay low.
Head the other way this time.
A row of teeth — glide over the top.
Spikes on the wall block that lane.
The ceiling is guarded — take the low road first.
The gauntlet. Everything you've learned.
Violet pads are sticky — they hold you. Stop, then flip a new way.
Stick to the ceiling, then drop straight down.
Chain the pads: floor, then ceiling.
Green pads fling you; sticky pads catch you.
The bounce house. Weave the pads to the top.
Grab the key, then reach the goal.
Keys open doors of the same color.
One key can open several doors.
Two colors. Take each key before its door.
The vault. Two keys, two doors, mind the spikes.
Orange zones make you HEAVY. A heavy ball smashes orange blocks.
Grab the weight first, then smash through.
No orange zone here — the block is solid. Go around.
Fragile ground. Weight up, smash through, drop in.
Portals warp you across — you keep your speed and direction.
A portal can send you from the floor to the ceiling.
Warp right over the spikes.
Two portal pairs — chain them.
The wormhole gauntlet. Chain the warps.
Hit the ⇄ switch to flip which color is solid.
Two colors — flip at each switch to open the way.
Make a block solid to stop before the spikes.
Chromatic chaos. Flip through every gate.
The laser blinks. Cross while it's off.
Cross a horizontal beam by going up.
Slow-mo zones cap your speed — more time to thread.
No laser — just slow, precise motion.
Beat the clock. Cross the whole grid in one gap.
Inside a teal zone, gravity points a fixed way — up here.
Black holes pull you in. Keep your distance.
The singularity. Slip past the pull, ride the reversal.
You have a SHIFT BUDGET now. Spend it wisely.
Three shifts, three moves. No waste.
Catch on the ceiling pad, then drop between the teeth.
The floor is a trap — take the high road. The key won't survive a death.
The event horizon. Weight up, smash through, take the key, rise.
